nasb.text: Why then have you brought the Lord’s assembly into this wilderness, for us and our beasts to die here?

esv.text: Why have you brought the assembly of the Lord into this wilderness, that we should die here, both we and our cattle?

cnv.text: 你們為甚麼把耶和華的會眾領到這曠野來，使我們和我們的牲畜都死在這裡呢？

ccb.text: 你们为什么领耶和华的会众到这旷野来，要叫我们和牲畜都死在这里吗？
